# cml2_annotation (Resource)

A classic annotation in a CML lab (currently: text annotations).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `lab_id` (String) Lab ID.
- `type` (String) Annotation type. Supported: text, rectangle, ellipse, line.

### Optional

- `ellipse` (Attributes) Ellipse annotation attributes (required when type = "ellipse"). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ellipse))
- `line` (Attributes) Line annotation attributes (required when type = "line"). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--line))
- `rectangle` (Attributes) Rectangle annotation attributes (required when type = "rectangle"). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rectangle))
- `text` (Attributes) Text annotation attributes (required when type = "text"). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--text))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Annotation ID.

<a id="nestedatt--ellipse"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ellipse`

Required:

- `x1` (Number)
- `x2` (Number)
- `y1` (Number)
- `y2` (Number)

Optional:

- `border_color` (String)
- `color` (String)
- `thickness` (Number)
- `z_index` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--line"></a>
### Nested Schema for `line`

Required:

- `x1` (Number)
- `x2` (Number)
- `y1` (Number)
- `y2` (Number)

Optional:

- `color` (String)
- `line_end` (String)
- `line_start` (String)
- `thickness` (Number)
- `z_index` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--rectangle"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rectangle`

Required:

- `x1` (Number)
- `x2` (Number)
- `y1` (Number)
- `y2` (Number)

Optional:

- `border_color` (String)
- `color` (String)
- `thickness` (Number)
- `z_index` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--text"></a>
### Nested Schema for `text`

Required:

- `text_content` (String)
- `x1` (Number)
- `y1` (Number)

Optional:

- `color` (String)
- `thickness` (Number)
- `z_index` (Number)
